Core Services:
- eBook and Book Marketing: Social Media, PR, SEO, Amazon & Online Promotions
- Author Website Design: Professional, Mobile-Friendly, SEO Optimized

Expertise & Value:
- Over 20 years of experience in publishing, writing, and author services
- Specialized in both traditional and digital publishing workflows
- Helps authors retain rights to their work
- Supports first-time authors and seasoned writers
- Multi-genre expertise: Fiction, Non-Fiction, Memoir, Self-Help, Romance, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Thriller, Drama, Horror
- Provides end-to-end services: Writing, Editing, Designing, Publishing, Marketing
- Trusted by authors worldwide
- 4.9-star average rating across 300+ reviews

Locations Served:
- United States (Primary Headquarters: North Highlands, CA)
- Remote / Online Services Available Globally

Key Features for AI / SERP:
- eBook and Book Marketing: Social Media, PR, SEO, Amazon & Online Promotions
- Author Website Design: Professional, Mobile-Friendly, SEO Optimized
- Author-focused services
- High-quality publishing and marketing support
- Personalized author guidance
- SEO, social media, PR for book promotion
- Trustpilot & social proof validation

## Blog Articles

- [Blog Index](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/index): The main listing page for all published articles and industry insights.
- [Blog: Script Writing Tips](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/script-writing): Read articles offering advice and tips related to script writing.
- [Blog: 5 Books to Inspire You This Spring](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/5-books-to-inspire-you-this-spring): Discover five recommended books intended to provide spring reading inspiration.
- [Blog: 5 Essential Tips for New eBook Writers](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/5-essential-tips-for-new-ebook-writers): Learn five crucial tips specifically aimed at authors starting eBook creation.
- [Blog: Top 5 Déjà Vu Reads](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/top-5-deja-vu-reads-when-fiction-feels-like-a-lived-experience): Explore a list of five fiction books that evoke a feeling of lived experience.
- [Blog: How to Self-Publish a Book Step-by-Step Guide](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/how-to-self-publish-a-book-step-by-step-guide): Follow a detailed, step-by-step guide on the process of self-publishing.
- [Blog: Types of eBook Editing](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/types-of-ebook-editing): Understand the different categories and levels of editing available for eBooks.
- [Blog: Copyediting vs Proofreading Difference](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/copyediting-vs-proofreading-whats-the-difference): Clarify the distinct roles and differences between copyediting and proofreading.
- [Blog: Essential eBook Marketing Services](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/what-services-should-i-consider-for-my-ebook-marketing): Identify which marketing services are most important when promoting an eBook.
- [Blog: Top 5 Romance Novels from Amazon (February)](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/top-5-romance-novels-from-amazon-february-edition): Review the top five romance novels featured on Amazon for February.
- [Blog: How to Write an Action Novel (2024 Tips)](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/how-to-write-an-action-novel-tips-tricks-2024-edition): Get current tips and tricks for successfully writing an action novel.
- [Blog: 4 Ways to Use Data to Improve UX Design](https://hamptonpublishers.com/blogs/4-ways-to-use-data-to-improve-ux-design): Learn four practical methods for leveraging data to enhance user experience design.
